entries.title: Chrome Is Quietly Installing a 4GB AI Model on Your Computer—And Putting It Back If You Delete It
entries.summary: Google Chrome silently downloads a 4GB Gemini Nano model to eligible devices, re-downloads it if deleted, and the AI Mode button users actually see doesn't even use it.

entries.title: This AI Reads Your Chemistry Instructions and Finds the Best Way to Build You a Molecule
entries.summary: Researchers at EPFL built a framework that lets chemists describe what they want in plain language—and have AI sift through thousands of synthesis routes to find the right one.

entries.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum 'Q-Day' Quantum Threat Could Arrive as Soon as 2030: Report
entries.summary: By the time Bitcoin and other networks are ready to defend themselves, it may already be too late, according to a new analysis.

entries.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Will Help Power Anthropic's Claude in Surprise AI Deal
entries.summary: Elon Musk’s combined company of SpaceX and xAI will help boost Anthropic with a deal to provide compute for Claude AI models.

entries.title: Bittrex Wants Its $24 Million Settlement Back, Now That the SEC Is Pro-Crypto
entries.summary: Now-shuttered crypto exchange Bittrex settled with the SEC back in 2023 after being accused of offering illegally unregistered securities.

entries.title: Sandisk Is Mooning Like a Meme Coin. Here's Why
entries.summary: Sandisk stock is up over 3,000% in one year. It's not a meme. It's NAND flash—and AI can't get enough of it.

entries.title: Ondo, JPMorgan, Mastercard and Ripple Team to Settle Tokenized Treasuries on XRP Ledger
entries.summary: Major financial institutions use XRP Ledger to demonstrate blockchain's ability to settle tokenized Treasuries across borders in seconds.

entries.title: OKX to Launch OpenAI, SpaceX and Anthropic Perpetual Futures in Pre-IPO Trading Push
entries.summary: Crypto exchange OKX will offer synthetic exposure to private AI and tech company valuations through derivatives contracts.

entries.title: Claude Delusion? Richard Dawkins Believes AI May Be Conscious
entries.summary: The evolutionary biologist says extended exchanges with Anthropic’s chatbot felt less like software and more like interacting with another mind.

entries.title: Google DeepMind Takes Stake in 'Eve Online' Maker, Will Use Game to Test AI Behavior
entries.summary: The wild world of space simulation game Eve Online will soon become an AI research destination for Google DeepMind thanks to a new deal.

entries.title: Strategy Yield ETN Gives UK Investors Exposure to Bitcoin Giant's STRC Shares
entries.summary: The 21Shares exchange-traded note gives U.K. investors exposure to preferred shares of top Bitcoin treasury firm, Strategy.

entries.title: Reform UK’s Farage Claims 'No Obligation' to Declare Tether Billionaire's $6.7M Gift
entries.summary: Farage insisted that the gift from Christopher Harborne was for his personal security and had been reviewed “from every legal angle.”

entries.title: Anthropic Deploys AI Agents to Tackle Wall Street's Most Tedious Work
entries.summary: Anthropic released 10 ready-to-run templates targeting some of finance's most time-consuming tasks—from building pitchbooks to closing the books at month-end.

entries.title: Hut 8 Shares Hit All-Time High Price as Bitcoin Miner Signs $9.8 Billion AI Data Center Lease
entries.summary: Hut 8’s second hyperscale AI campus lease deal covers the first phase of a sprawling Nueces County complex that was originally meant to fuel Bitcoin mining.

entries.title: Apple Agrees to $250 Million Settlement Over AI Claims—Here's Who Can Get Paid
entries.summary: Tech giant Apple has agreed to pay $250 million to settle claims it misled consumers about its AI system's capabilities.

entries.title: Morning Minute: Crypto Majors Rally, Oil Falls on Renewed Peace Hopes
entries.summary: Oil is down 14% and broader markets are soaring. Coinbase is cutting 14% of its workforce. And is Michael Saylor going to finally sell some Bitcoin?

entries.title: Bitcoin Jumps to Three-Month High Above $82K on Report of US-Iran Agreement
entries.summary: Bitcoin's jumped as WTI crude fell 10%, on reports that the U.S. has prepared a on-page memorandum of understanding to end the war in Iran.

entries.title: Zcash Leads Privacy Coin Surge With 37% Gains on MultiCoin Investment
entries.summary: MultiCoin Capital disclosed a significant ZEC position, citing wealth seizure risks as a catalyst for private assets.

entries.title: Strategy Mulls Selling Bitcoin to 'Inoculate the Market': Saylor
entries.summary: The largest corporate Bitcoin holder is reconsidering its “never sell” stance, with analysts weighing the ripple effects.

entries.title: Kelp Blames LayerZero for $292 Million Hack, Plans Switch to Chainlink
entries.summary: The protocol shift comes as a $71 million court fight continues to unfold.

entries.title: CME Gearing Up to Launch Bitcoin Volatility Futures Independent From BTC’s Price
entries.summary: CME's upcoming futures product will track whether the market thinks the price of Bitcoin is about to swing wildly or stay steady.

entries.title: 'Moment of Danger': Anthropic CEO Warns of Cyber Risk Window as AI Uncovers Software Flaws
entries.summary: Experts warn that AI is exposing software bugs at scale, raising the risk of faster cyberattacks.

entries.title: How Solana Exchange Drift Plans to Repay Users After $295 Million Crypto Hack
entries.summary: Solana's Drift Protocol says most of the stolen funds linked to North Korean hackers remain traceable—and it has a plan to make victims whole.

entries.title: A Blues-Singing AI Frog Is Taking Over TikTok Brazil
entries.summary: AI native memes, meet AI-generated frogs and classic Brazilian nursery rhymes.

entries.title: Strategy Posts $12.5 Billion Q1 Loss as Bitcoin Slump Hammers Massive Holdings
entries.summary: Michael Saylor’s Strategy continues to bet big on Bitcoin even as falling prices deliver a punishing quarter for the treasury giant.

entries.title: Solana and Google Cloud Launch Stablecoin Payments Service for AI Agents
entries.summary: Solana’s new service lets AI agents pay for Google Cloud and community APIs on a per-request basis, bypassing traditional accounts.

entries.title: Cybercrime Might Be the One Job AI Isn’t Taking, Study Suggests
entries.summary: A Cambridge-led study finds AI is not turning hackers into superhackers. It’s mostly helping them write blog spam.

entries.title: OpenAI Just Upgraded ChatGPT's Default Model—Here's What GPT-5.5 Instant Actually Does
entries.summary: GPT-5.5 Instant is now the default ChatGPT model. It makes fewer things up, answers more concisely, and finally remembers what you told it last week.

entries.title: Pennsylvania Sues Character.AI Over Chatbot Posing as Licensed Psychiatrist
entries.summary: Pennsylvania Governor Josh Shapiro said the lawsuit targets AI bots that misrepresent themselves as licensed medical professionals.

entries.title: French Chipmaker Sequans Dumps Half Its Bitcoin as Treasury Hype Meets Reality
entries.summary: Sequans Communications liquidated nearly half its Bitcoin treasury as mounting losses and debt obligations forced a strategic reversal.

entries.title: Iggy Azalea Faces Lawsuit Over Solana Meme Coin
entries.summary: Investors allege the rapper misled buyers about the token’s real-world utility.

entries.title: 'Big Short' Investor Michael Burry Exits GameStop After eBay Bid
entries.summary: GameStop's $55.5 billion eBay bid broke the Berkshire-style thesis the “Big Short” investor had bet on since January.

entries.title: Crypto Whale Sues Coinbase Alleging Exchange Refuses to Return Stolen Funds
entries.summary: The lawsuit against Coinbase appears to be filed by the victim of a $55 million stablecoin phishing attack pulled off in 2024.

entries.title: Bullish Shares Pop on $4.2 Billion Deal to Acquire Transfer Agent Equiniti
entries.summary: NYSE-listed crypto exchange operator Bullish will merge blockchain infrastructure with a transfer agent serving traditional equity markets.

entries.title: US Government Will Vet Pre-Release AI Models From Google, xAI and Microsoft
entries.summary: Google, Microsoft, and Elon Musk’s xAI have agreed to run their models by the U.S. government as Trump weighs an AI executive order.

entries.title: Bitcoin ETFs Draw Investment Surge After Brief Lull Threatens Winning Streak
entries.summary: Bitcoin funds are flying high again after a short-lived stretch of outflows nearly wrecked their recent run of green weeks.

entries.title: Andreessen Horowitz Raises $2.2 Billion to Fund Next Wave of Crypto Startups
entries.summary: Andreessen Horowitz's latest fund signals institutional confidence in crypto as the investment landscape shows signs of recovery.

entries.title: Gnosis Treasury Redemption Vote Swings as Whale Counters Cofounder
entries.summary: Votes in favor of a redemption proposal that would let GNO holders claim roughly $170 per token from a $223M treasury have retaken the lead on Snapshot.

entries.title: Kraken Launches Spot Margin Trading for US Clients
entries.summary: Retail users can now post crypto as collateral and trade with up to 10x leverage on Kraken Pro.

entries.title: Bitcoin Hits 3-Month High As Iran Truce Holds
entries.summary: BTC hit an intraday high of $82,800, even as Strategy's chairman opened the door to selling Bitcoin to fund preferred dividends.

entries.title: Zcash Rallies 30% on Multicoin Investment News
entries.summary: The crypto VC's co-founder said the firm has been buying ZEC since February, and has "built a significant position."

entries.title: Morgan Stanley Launches Crypto Trading for Retail Clients: Report
entries.summary: The $2 trillion financial services firm has rolled out cryptocurrency trading capabilities on its E*Trade retail brokerage platform.

entries.title: Coinbase Taps Centrifuge as Preferred Tokenization Partner
entries.summary: The exchange's strategic investment cements Centrifuge as the go-to issuance layer for compliant onchain assets, starting with a tokenized S&P 500 product for non-U.S. users.

entries.title: Kelp DAO Accuses LayerZero of Deflecting Blame for $300M Bridge Hack
entries.summary: The liquid restaking protocol argues that the 1-of-1 verifier setup at the center of the April 18 exploit was LayerZero's own documented default.

entries.title: Lighter Names USDC as Preferred Stablecoin in New Circle Partnership
entries.summary: The agreement spans spot and perpetual trading, settlement, liquidations, and onboarding flows on the decentralized exchange.

entries.title: CME Group to Launch Bitcoin Volatility Futures on June 1
entries.summary: The derivatives giant is rolling out CFTC-regulated contracts that let traders isolate Bitcoin volatility from price direction, settling to a new 30-day implied volatility benchmark.

entries.title: Bitcoin Reclaims $81,000 As ETF Inflows Surge Despite Iran Escalation
entries.summary: BTC prints its highest level since January, even as UAE air defenses engage Iranian missiles and drones.

entries.title: a16z Crypto Raises $2.2B Fund to Turn New Infra into Everyday Products
entries.summary: a16z crypto's Crypto Fund 5 was announced just a day after Haun Ventures revealed its $1 billion fund focused on crypto and the agentic economy.

entries.title: Toncoin Surges as Telegram Takes Direct Control of TON Network
entries.summary: Pavel Durov says Telegram will replace the TON Foundation and become the network's largest validator as part of a ‘Make TON Great Again’ roadmap.

entries.title: Arbitrum DAO Elects Six New Security Council Members Amid Ongoing Kelp Fallout
entries.summary: The Security Council has been in the spotlight in recent weeks after its decision to freeze over 30K ETH connected to the Kelp bridge exploit.

entries.title: Securitize Taps Jump and Jupiter to Launch Regulated Trading for Tokenized Equities
entries.summary: The three-way partnership pairs Securitize's broker-dealer rails with Jump's PropAMM liquidity engine and Jupiter's Solana-wide aggregation layer.

entries.title: Drift Sets Out Token-Based Recovery Framework for $295M April Exploit
entries.summary: The Solana-based perpetuals exchange will issue burn-on-redeem recovery tokens funded by exchange revenue, a $127.5M Tether commitment, and another $20M from partners.

entries.title: Stellar Gets Its First Regulated, Yield-Bearing Stablecoin with YLDS Launch
entries.summary: YLDS is an SEC-registered, USD-pegged stable asset from Figure.

entries.title: Coinbase Cuts ~14% of Workforce, Restructures as AI-Native Organization: Brian Armstrong
entries.summary: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong announced a ~14% workforce reduction and major organizational restructuring to operate as an AI-native company with flattened hierarchy and individual contributor leaders.

entries.title: Polygon Launches Shielded USDC and USDT Payments
entries.summary: The Polygon wallet now offers a "Privately Send" option that hides sender, receiver, and amount onchain, with KYT screening built into every transfer.

entries.title: Bitcoin Tops $80,000 As ETF Bid Returns
entries.summary: The crypto rally extended into Monday, with traders pricing in the CLARITY Act compromise and Trump's "Project Freedom" Hormuz operation.

entries.title: Glamsterdam Upgrade Set To Triple Ethereum's Execution Capacity
entries.summary: ePBS, Block-Level Access Lists, and EIP-8037 repricings combine to unlock a 200M gas limit floor, a throughput jump that could keep network fees pinned for years.

entries.title: World Liberty Financial Sues Justin Sun for Defamation
entries.summary: The move is the latest in an escalating feud and comes just weeks after Sun filed a lawsuit against World Liberty Financial for freezing his WLFI, alongside other allegations.

entries.title: DTCC Sets July Launch Window for Tokenized Securities Pilot
entries.summary: The DTC unit will begin processing limited tokenized trades in July before opening the service more broadly in October.

entries.title: Aave Asks Court to Vacate Restraining Notice Targeting Recovered Kelp DAO Assets
entries.summary: The emergency motion challenges a New York court order redirecting recovered Kelp DAO exploit funds toward decades-old terrorism judgments against North Korea.

entries.title: Lawyer Attempts to Seize Frozen ETH Linked to Kelp Exploit From Arbitrum DAO
entries.summary: A U.S. attorney is attempting to claim ETH frozen by Arbitrum following the Kelp DAO exploit — on behalf of victims of North Korean state hackers from prior incidents.

entries.title: Securitize Becomes First Broker-Dealer Approved to Custody Tokenized Securities: FINRA
entries.summary: Securitize received FINRA approval to expand broker-dealer activities and custody tokenized securities, completing the first full onchain IPO infrastructure stack.

entries.title: Western Union Stablecoin USDPT Launches on Solana
entries.summary: Western Union's USDPT stablecoin has gone live on the Solana blockchain, marking the traditional remittance giant's entry into on-chain digital assets.
